# opnsense_trust_settings (Data Source)

Reads Trust global settings from the upstream system.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_trust_settings" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `cipher_string` (Set of String) Set of allowed TLS cipher names.
- `enable_config_constraints` (Boolean) Whether OpenSSL policy constraints are enforced.
- `enable_legacy_sect` (Boolean) Whether the OpenSSL legacy provider section is active.
- `fetch_crls` (Boolean) Whether the periodic CRL fetch cron job is enabled.
- `id` (String) Always set to `trust_settings`.
- `install_crls` (Boolean) Whether fetched CRLs are automatically installed.
- `store_intermediate_certs` (Boolean) Whether intermediate CA certificates are stored in the system trust store.
